title: MVCC (Multi-Version Concurrency Control)
description: Analyze how Multi-Version Concurrency Control (MVCC) uses snapshots and versioned rows to prevent read locks. Identify the operational costs and implications of "Vacuuming" dead tuples in MVCC-based systems.
objectives: Analyze how Multi-Version Concurrency Control (MVCC) uses snapshots and versioned rows to prevent read locks.
Identify the operational costs and implications of "Vacuuming" dead tuples in MVCC-based systems.
